'''ngabaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabinetmaker|cabinetmaker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabinetmaker|cabinetmaker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngabaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæbægæth|ngæbægæth]] || [[word:ngæbægæj|ngæbægæj]] || [[word:ngæbægæsh|ngæbægæsh]] || [[word:ngæbægæ|ngæbægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngababagath|ngababagath]] || [[word:ngababagaj|ngababagaj]] || [[word:ngababagash|ngababagash]] || [[word:ngababaga|ngababaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngabagath|ngabagath]] || [[word:ngabagaj|ngabagaj]] || [[word:ngabagash|ngabagash]] || [[word:ngabaga|ngabaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngabafgath|ngabafgath]] || [[word:ngabafgaj|ngabafgaj]] || [[word:ngabafgash|ngabafgash]] || [[word:ngabafgaf|ngabafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngabagatha|ngabagatha]] || [[word:ngabagaja|ngabagaja]] || [[word:ngabagasha|ngabagasha]] || [[word:ngabagaka|ngabagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngabagath|ngabagath]] || [[word:ngabagaj|ngabagaj]] || [[word:ngabagash|ngabagash]] || [[word:ngabaga|ngabaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngabagathal|ngabagathal]] || [[word:ngabagajal|ngabagajal]] || [[word:ngabagashal|ngabagashal]] || [[word:ngabagakal|ngabagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngabagathatha|ngabagathatha]] || [[word:ngabagajaja|ngabagajaja]] || [[word:ngabagashasha|ngabagashasha]] || [[word:ngabagaka|ngabagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngabagathan|ngabagathan]] || [[word:ngabagajan|ngabagajan]] || [[word:ngabagashan|ngabagashan]] || [[word:ngabagakan|ngabagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngabagathaoro|ngabagathaoro]] || [[word:ngabagajaoro|ngabagajaoro]] || [[word:ngabagashaoro|ngabagashaoro]] || [[word:ngabagakaoro|ngabagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
